name: HFlow2
description: Data coalesing tool for honeynet/network analysis. Tool: https://projects.honeynet.org/hflow. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #474 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map HFlow2 output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved HFlow2 output file to parse instead of running it live.
